metadata.title: Privacy Policy — Visit Auschwitz Book Project
metadata.description: Learn how your personal data is collected, used, and protected when you use the Auschwitz book project website. GDPR-compliant data handling.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This website is operated by ŁUKASZ TARNOWSKI, conducting business under the name ŁUKASZ TARNOWSKI, registered in the Central Register and Information on Economic Activity (CEIDG), NIP: 5492257321, REGON: 12022820400000, with its registered office at UL. DR JANUSZA KORCZAKA 17, PL-32-600 RAJSKO, Poland ("Administrator"). This website is a personal and professional project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the Auschwitz-Birkenau State Museum or any other institution. This Privacy Policy explains how personal data is collected, used, and protected in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), the Polish Personal Data Protection Act, and other applicable laws.

dataCollection.title: Information I Collect
dataCollection.intro: I collect the following personal data voluntarily provided through the contact form and newsletter signup:
dataCollection.item3: Any book ideas, historical information, or suggestions you choose to share
dataCollection.item4: Technical data processed automatically by infrastructure providers, including IP address logs processed by Cloudflare for security purposes and approximate geolocation data (country/region) derived from your IP address
dataCollection.item5: Geolocation data — only when you explicitly use the "Locate Me" feature on the interactive map. Your location is processed locally in the browser to display your position on the map and is not stored or transmitted to any server

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: Personal data is processed on the following legal bases under Article 6 GDPR: (a) your consent (Article 6(1)(a)) for email communications and analytics cookies; (b) the legitimate interest of the Administrator (Article 6(1)(f)) for responding to inquiries, improving the website, ensuring security, and protecting against abuse; (c) where applicable in the future, performance of a contract (Article 6(1)(b)) if paid products or services are offered.

dataUse.title: How I Use Your Information
dataUse.intro: Your data may be used for the following purposes:
dataUse.item1: Responding to inquiries and communicating regarding the book project and related initiatives
dataUse.item2: Sending informational and promotional emails regarding my historical, educational, publishing, or future commercial projects, including books, digital products, consultations, guided services, and related resources
dataUse.item3: Understanding audience interests and improving content
dataUse.item4: Ensuring website security and preventing abuse
dataUse.item5: Developing future services, including online consultations, educational resources, or e-commerce offerings

emailMarketing.title: Email Communications
emailMarketing.content: By submitting your email address, you consent to receiving occasional informational and promotional communications related to my historical, educational, and publishing activities. This may include updates about books, digital products, consultations, and related initiatives. Consent may be withdrawn at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal. Each email contains an unsubscribe option. You also have the right to object to the processing of your personal data for direct marketing purposes at any time under Article 21(2) GDPR. Upon receiving such an objection, your data will no longer be processed for direct marketing.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.content: Personal data is retained until you withdraw your consent or unsubscribe from communications. Data stored in MongoDB Atlas is deleted upon request or when no longer necessary for the purposes described in this policy. Data necessary for legal or accounting obligations (if applicable in the future) may be retained for the period required by law. Server security logs processed by Cloudflare are retained according to their infrastructure policies.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: This website uses cookies and similar technologies.

essential.title: Essential and Functional Cookies
essential.content: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly, including remembering your cookie preferences and interface settings such as dark mode. These cookies do not require consent.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: With your consent, Google Analytics 4 is used to analyze website traffic and improve user experience. Data retention in Google Analytics is set to the maximum available period. Analytics cookies are activated only after your explicit consent.

cookies.control: You can accept or decline analytics cookies via the cookie banner when visiting the site. You may also adjust your browser settings to control cookies.

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.content: Personal data submitted through this website is stored in MongoDB Atlas, a cloud-hosted database service provided by MongoDB, Inc. Data is stored on servers located within the European Union (EU region). MongoDB Atlas is used to securely store user data, including account information, newsletter subscriptions, and other data necessary for the provision of services described in this policy. Additionally, approximate geolocation data (country/region level, derived from your IP address) may be stored to improve content relevance and comply with regional legal requirements. MongoDB Atlas employs encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, and regular security audits.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Service Providers
thirdParty.content: The website uses the following service providers: Cloudflare (hosting, infrastructure, and security services), MongoDB Atlas (cloud database, EU region), Resend (email delivery), and Google (Google Analytics). These providers may process personal data on behalf of the Administrator under data processing agreements.

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Data stored in MongoDB Atlas is hosted within the European Union. Some other service providers, including Cloudflare, Resend, and Google, may process personal data outside the European Economic Area (EEA), including in the United States. Transfers are carried out based on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) or other legally recognized safeguards, including participation in the EU–US Data Privacy Framework where applicable.

thirdPartyData.title: Data Concerning Third Parties
thirdPartyData.content: If you voluntarily provide personal data concerning third parties (for example historical references to family members), you are responsible for ensuring that you have a legal basis to share such information. Sensitive data should only be shared voluntarily and at your discretion.

automatedDecisions.title: Automated Decision-Making
automatedDecisions.content: This website does not use automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects or similarly significantly affects you.

minimumAge.title: Minimum Age
minimumAge.content: This website and its services are intended for individuals aged 16 years or older, in accordance with Article 8 of the GDPR and its implementation under Polish law. If you are under 16, you may not submit personal data through this website without the consent of your parent or legal guardian. The Administrator does not knowingly collect personal data from individuals under 16 years of age without such consent.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.item1: Right of access to your personal data
rights.item2: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
rights.item3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
rights.item6: Right to withdraw consent at any time
rights.item7: Right to lodge a complaint with the President of the Personal Data Protection Office (UODO) in Poland
rights.item8: Right to object to the processing of your personal data for direct marketing purposes at any time (Article 21(2) GDPR) — this is an absolute right that requires no justification

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: To exercise your rights or for any privacy-related questions, contact: visitauschwitzinfo@gmail.com

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated to reflect legal, technical, or business changes. The current version will always be available on this page with the updated date.

metadata.title: Terms of Use — Visit Auschwitz Book Project
metadata.description: Review the terms and conditions governing your use of the Auschwitz book project website, including intellectual property and user obligations.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of this website operated by ŁUKASZ TARNOWSKI, conducting business under the name ŁUKASZ TARNOWSKI, registered in the Central Register and Information on Economic Activity (CEIDG), NIP: 5492257321, REGON: 12022820400000, with its registered office at UL. DR JANUSZA KORCZAKA 17, PL-32-600 RAJSKO, Poland ("Service Provider"). By accessing or using this website, you agree to comply with these Terms.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.content: This website and its services are intended for individuals aged 16 years or older. By using this website and submitting personal data, you confirm that you are at least 16 years of age. If you are under 16, you may use this website only with the involvement and consent of your parent or legal guardian.

natureOfWebsite.title: Nature of the Website
natureOfWebsite.content: This website provides historical, educational, and informational content related to Auschwitz and related topics. It may also offer books, digital products, consultations, guided services, and other related services. The website is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the Auschwitz-Birkenau State Museum or any other institution.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content available on this website, including texts, articles, graphics, branding elements, and digital materials, is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. Unless otherwise stated, all rights are reserved by the Service Provider. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, publish, or commercially exploit any content without prior written consent.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: You agree to use the website in a lawful and respectful manner. It is prohibited to submit unlawful content, infringe the rights of third parties, attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems, or interfere with the proper functioning of the website.

userSubmissions.title: User Submissions
userSubmissions.content: If you submit suggestions, ideas, historical materials, or other content through the website, you confirm that you have the right to share such materials. By submitting content, you grant the Service Provider a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, review, and potentially incorporate such submissions into future projects, unless otherwise agreed.

servicesAndSales.title: Services and Digital Products
servicesAndSales.content: The website may offer paid products or services, including books, digital materials, consultations, guided services, or educational resources. Detailed terms, pricing, payment conditions, and refund policies will be provided before any purchase is completed. Separate contractual terms may apply to specific services.

consumerRights.title: Consumer Rights (EU)
consumerRights.content: If you are a consumer within the European Union, you may have statutory rights, including the right to withdraw from certain distance contracts within 14 days, unless exceptions apply (such as digital content delivered with prior consent to immediate performance). These rights remain unaffected by these Terms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Liability
disclaimer.content: The website content is provided for informational and educational purposes only. While reasonable efforts are made to ensure accuracy, no guarantee is given that all information is complete, up-to-date, or free of errors. The Service Provider shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the website, except where liability cannot be excluded under applicable law.

externalLinks.title: External Links
externalLinks.content: The website may contain links to third-party websites. The Service Provider is not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of external websites.

technicalAvailability.title: Technical Availability
technicalAvailability.content: The Service Provider does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free access to the website. Access may be temporarily restricted due to maintenance, updates, or technical issues.

modifications.title: Changes to the Terms
modifications.content: The Service Provider reserves the right to update or modify these Terms of Use at any time. The current version will always be available on this page with the updated date.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Republic of Poland and applicable European Union law. Any disputes shall be resolved by competent courts in accordance with applicable consumer protection regulations.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact: visitauschwitzinfo@gmail.com

banner.message: This site uses cookies essential for functionality and analytics cookies (Google Analytics) that help me analyze traffic and improve content. Analytics cookies are set only with your consent. You can change your mind at any time.

necessary.name: Essential
necessary.description: Required for the website to function properly (preferences, dark mode, etc.). No consent needed.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.description: Google Analytics 4 — anonymous visit statistics. Data retained for max 14 months.
